title: Sea Blue Sky Overlay
description: A fabricskybox sky overlay of a beautiful blue sky over an ocean.
body:
This resource pack contains a beautiful sky over a vast blue ocean. With the various clouds filling the sky, an immersive atmosphere is seen. 

**This resource pack requires the mod FabricSkyBoxes. Without it you will be unable to see it.**

If you wish to see more like this please join my discord [https://discord.gg/YrSWPbWDUF](https://discord.gg/YrSWPbWDUF)

![Sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e468108f248b8e59af6a5660c716cd9505be59d_0.webp)
